notes: Scores how precisely a correction command identifies the memories it will supersede. MEMORY_CARD-targeted commands use a deterministic id and must be perfect. AURORA_UNDERSTANDING free-text commands fall back to case-insensitive substring matching on title/summary and are known to over-match when two memories share a 4+ character phrase; that fragility is measured here, not hidden, and is the reason the UI now offers a star-targeted MEMORY_CARD correction entry point instead of relying on free text alone.

memories.title: 朋友一句玩笑后的沉默
memories.summary: 那一刻让我感到被忽视，不只是玩笑本身

memories.title: 同事一句玩笑引发的不安
memories.summary: 同事的玩笑也让我感到被忽视，很尴尬

memories.title: 考试倒计时里的回避感
memories.summary: 紧张感压住了真正的准备动作

memories.title: 项目推进时的回避感
memories.summary: 把任务失败解释成我这个人不行

memories.title: 黄昏散步带来的短暂停顿
memories.summary: 看到夕阳时会停下来几分钟

memories.title: 深夜写日记时更诚实
memories.summary: 说出白天没有表达的情绪

memories.title: 对界面质感的审美要求
memories.summary: 偏好莫兰迪浅米色的温柔界面

memories.title: 对模板化回复的强烈排斥
memories.summary: 能敏锐感到固定话术和真实理解的差异

cases.label: distinctive free-text phrase matches only its own memory
distinctive free-text phrase matches only ui-taste
ambiguous phrase shared by two memories over-matches
ambiguous phrase shared by two other memories over-matches
below the 4-char guard matches nothing by design
phrase absent from any memory matches nothing
